name: New Year's Day Black-Eyed Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans well in cold water several times.
2. Place the beans in a large, heavy stew pot and cover with water.
3. Allow to soak overnight.
4. The next morning, pour off the soaking water and ham bone, adding 8 cups of water, chopped onion, and seasonings.
5. Put on the back of the stove and let simmer gently until the beans are very tender (usually about 4 hours).
6. Add more water if needed.
7. Remove and discard the ham bone.
8. If the liquid looks a bit scant, add 1-2 cups more.
9. When the beans are thoroughly tender, remove about a cupful of them and mash well with some of the bean liquid (a blender can be used for this).
10. Return the mashed beans to the pot, taste for seasoning, and serve steaming hot over freshly cooked white rice.
